noas.description: Sign in with username and password
noas.signUpDescription: Create a new Noas account to use with Nodex
noas.hostHint: Advanced only: use a custom Noas host.
noas.editHostWarning: Only change this if you know what you're doing.
noas.usernameHint: 3-32 chars: lowercase letters, numbers, _ and -. Type @ to use another host.
noas.fullHandleHint: Enter your full handle, for example username@example.com
noas.privateKeyWarning: Your private key is stored securely. Keep it safe and never share it.
noas.footerText: Your keys are encrypted and never leave your device

errors.usernameFormat: Username must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.signUpFailed: Sign up failed. Please check your details and try again.

modal.title: Sign in to Nostr
modal.descriptionChoose: Choose how you want to authenticate to post to Nostr relays.
modal.descriptionPrivateKey: Enter your Nostr private key (nsec or hex format).
modal.descriptionNostrConnect: Connect with a signer app using Nostr Connect (NIP-46).
modal.extensionSignInHint: Sign in with Alby, nos2x, or another NIP-07 extension
modal.signerAppHint: Nostr connect using a bunker:// link
modal.noasAuthHint: Sign in with username and password
modal.privateKeyHint: Enter your nsec or hex private key
modal.guestIdentityHint: Generate a temporary identity to try posting
modal.securityHint: Your keys never leave your device or signer app. Signing happens locally or in your signer.
modal.privateKeyLocalOnly: Your key is only used locally and never sent to any server.
modal.signerHint: Paste the bunker:// link from your signer app to connect.

errors.extensionFailed: Failed to sign in with extension. Make sure you have a Nostr extension (like Alby or nos2x) installed.
errors.privateKeyInvalid: Invalid private key. Please check and try again.
errors.signerRequired: Please paste a bunker:// connection string
errors.signerFailed: Failed to connect. Verify your bunker:// string and try again.
errors.noasFailed: Noas sign-in failed. Please check your username and password.
errors.noasConnectionFailed: Connection to the Noas host failed. Check the host URL and try again.
errors.noasInvalidHost: Enter a valid Noas host URL.
errors.noasKeyMismatch: Noas sign-in failed because the returned key does not match your account. Please contact your Noas host admin.
errors.noasServerFailed: Noas sign-in failed due to a server or key error. Please try again.
errors.noasSignUpConnectionFailed: Connection to the Noas host failed during sign-up. Check the host URL and try again.
errors.noasSignUpInvalidHost: Enter a valid Noas host URL before signing up.
errors.noasSignUpServerFailed: Noas sign-up failed due to a server error. Please try again.

success.guest: Signed in as guest! A new identity was created for you.

preferences.undoSendLabel: Delay send so you can undo
preferences.autoCaptionLabel: Generate image captions on this device

menu.profileDescription: Your Nostr metadata (`kind:0`) will be published to connected spaces. Username is required.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Username *
profile.nip05Placeholder: Your NIP-05 identifier name@domain.com verified by domain
profile.aboutPlaceholder: Tell people a little about yourself
profile.nameInvalidNip05: Username must use lowercase letters, numbers, dots, underscores, or hyphens
profile.nameTaken: This username is already known. Please choose another.
profile.noRelayConnected: Connect to at least one space to edit your profile
profile.presenceDescription: Broadcast your current view and active task (NIP-38). Disable for privacy.
profile.undoSendDescription: Delay Nostr publish by a few seconds so you can undo from the toast or post card.
profile.autoCaptionDescription: Generate image alt text on this device. One-time model download may use roughly 30-80 MB.
profile.updateFailed: Failed to update profile. Check space connectivity and try again.
